modmenu.descriptionTranslation.smoothski: Fixes several skybox related graphical issues
smoothskies.clear-skies.description:
Removes banding on the horizon, making the sky one uniform color.

This is taken from grondag's Clear Skies mod.
smoothskies.clear-skies.name: Clear Skies
smoothskies.fix-skybox-clipping.descript: Fixes skybox clipping on low render distances by increasing far plane clipping.
smoothskies.fix-skybox-clipping.name: Fix Skybox Clipping
smoothskies.lower-sky-void-darkness.desc:
Correctly lowers the height when the sky turns black to the world's lowest height.

This prevents the sky from suddenly turning black at a high Y value, and should now smoothly fade to black instead.

Most noticeable in Skyblock or void type worlds.
smoothskies.lower-sky-void-darkness.name: Lower Sky Void Darkness
smoothskies.remove-sky-in-void.descripti: Removes the sky when in the void. This fixes MC-249655.
smoothskies.remove-sky-in-void.name: Remove Sky in the Void
smoothskies.set-fog-view-distance.descri:
Set a custom view distance for the skybox fog.

Higher numbers mean bluer skies.
smoothskies.set-fog-view-distance.name: Set Fog View Distance
